summary: Comprehensive testing of LobsterLite dual-model AI agent app. Backend: 14/14 tests passing (100%). Frontend: Onboarding flow verified, but critical navigation bug prevents full testing of main app features. All backend APIs working correctly including chat endpoint with dual-model routing.

minor.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error on first GET when collection is empty. After PUT operation, GET works fine. Error: ValueError: [TypeError('ObjectId' object is not iterable)]
minor.note: Endpoints work after initial data is created via PUT. Issue only occurs on very first GET with empty database.

integration_issues.flow: Onboarding completion and navigation to main app
integration_issues.issue: After completing all 3 onboarding steps and clicking 'Get Started' or 'Skip', the app does not navigate to the main chat/(tabs) route. Instead, it reloads back to onboarding step 0. This blocks access to the main application features.
integration_issues.root_cause: Likely AsyncStorage.setItem('onboarding_completed', 'true') not completing before router.replace('/(tabs)') is called, or the app's root _layout is not checking AsyncStorage properly and always routing to /onboarding

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix onboarding completion flow - ensure AsyncStorage.setItem completes before navigation and root _layout properly checks onboarding_completed flag

After onboarding fix, re-test all frontend screens: Chat message sending, Settings theme toggle, Memory Manager tabs, Tools list (verify 10 tools), Model Manager downloads, SOUL Editor, Keywords editor
OPTIONAL: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in get_action_keywords() and get_settings() functions by excluding _id field when returning data
OPTIONAL: Fix React Native deprecation warnings for Image.resizeMode and pointerEvents
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB ObjectId issue: All database queries should exclude _id field when returning JSON responses. Use projection {"_id": 0} in find() and find_one() calls consistently.
Onboarding flow: Check /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx to ensure it properly awaits AsyncStorage.getItem('onboarding_completed') before deciding to route to /onboarding or /(tabs)
Onboarding completion: In /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx lines 21-31, ensure AsyncStorage.setItem is awaited before router.replace() is called

success_rate.frontend: 40% (Onboarding screens verified, main app navigation blocked by critical bug)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Backend tests use dynamic test data with 'TEST_' prefix that gets cleaned up. Some test data persists in MongoDB: keywords=['test keyword 1', 'test keyword 2', 'open app'], settings.theme='dark', soul.content='# Identity\n- Name: TestBot...'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. Critical onboarding navigation bug blocks frontend testing. After main agent fixes onboarding, next tester should verify: (1) Chat screen sends messages and receives AI responses (allow 5-8 seconds for LLM), (2) Action messages trigger tool execution and display action cards, (3) All Settings sub-screens load (SOUL, Keywords, Memory, Tools, Models, Benchmark), (4) Theme toggle changes UI appearance, (5) Model download simulation works.
rca_of_issue:
Root Cause Analysis: Onboarding Navigation Bug

Reproduction Steps:
1. Open app at https://offline-assistant-26.preview.emergentagent.com
2. Onboarding screen loads (step 0 - Welcome)
3. Click 'Continue' -> Step 1 (Personalize) loads ✓
4. Click 'Continue' -> Step 2 (Ready) loads ✓
5. Click 'Get Started' -> Expected: navigate to /(tabs) route with chat screen
6. Actual: App reloads and shows onboarding step 0 again

Alternate flow:
1. From step 0, click 'Skip' button
2. Expected: navigate to /(tabs) route
3. Actual: Same issue - reloads to onboarding step 0

Root Cause:
Likely race condition in /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx:
- Lines 21-31 (completeOnboarding function) and 34-37 (skipOnboarding function)
- AsyncStorage.setItem() is async but may not complete before router.replace('/(tabs)') executes
- OR: Root _layout.tsx doesn't properly check AsyncStorage and always redirects to /onboarding

Mitigation:
1. In onboarding.tsx, ensure all AsyncStorage.setItem calls complete before router.replace()
2. In _layout.tsx, verify AsyncStorage.getItem('onboarding_completed') is properly awaited and checked
3. Add console.log statements to debug navigation flow
4. Consider using useEffect with AsyncStorage loading state before rendering routes
